anchor: STUDIO STYLE — keep this IDENTICAL across the whole set so every photo clearly comes from the same shoot: a seamless warm off-white / soft cream studio backdrop, bright high-key and airy, soft diffused daylight falling gently from the upper left, a soft natural contact shadow under the product, calm minimal-classic premium mood, warm-neutral colour grade, no harsh shadows, no coloured light. Subject is a plain BLANK natural-cotton canvas tote bag in cream/ecru with cream webbing handles.

shots.input: C:/Users/Golf/Gopremium-website/Gopremium new version/รูปสินค้า/3.Bag/BG001 - classic/กระเป๋าผ้า รุ่น Classic/1.png
shots.scene: Shot: lightly styled, the tote standing UPRIGHT and FULL so it holds a clean rectangular shape, with a softly rolled knit scarf and a small bunch of dried wildflowers peeking gently out of the open top, resting on the plain studio floor. Use ONLY plain text-free objects — absolutely no books, magazines, newspapers, labels or printed covers anywhere. The bag stays the clear main subject, sharp focus.

shots.input: C:/Users/Golf/Gopremium-website/Gopremium new version/รูปสินค้า/3.Bag/BG001 - classic/กระเป๋าผ้า รุ่น Classic/1.png
shots.scene: Shot: the tote stands UPRIGHT on a simple light-wood stool in a bright minimal studio corner. The bag is full and clearly holds a structured rectangular tote shape with both handles standing up and visible, photographed at a slight 3/4 angle. Soft daylight, generous clean negative space around it for an editorial feel. It must read unmistakably as an upright tote bag, not a flat cushion.
